title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SENTENCE IMPROVEMENT 201 300 BY

questions.question: An awkward neither grammatically accurate sentence is the result of centre implanting. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_0](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'But' का प्रयोग विपरीत विचार (contrasting idea) को indicate करने के लिए किया जाता है। 'Awkward' और 'grammatically accurate' विपरीत हैं.[span_0](end_span)

questions.question: The referee declared that the participant who will score the highest points in the tally will take away the cash prize of ₹50 lakh. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_1](start_span)[span_2](start_span)
options: who can score the highest point
who could score the highest point
who settles scores the highest point
questions.explanation: यह एक general rule या condition है, इसलिए Simple Present Tense का प्रयोग होगा. 'Singular Sub. + V1-s/es' सही structure है.[span_1](end_span)[span_2](end_span)

questions.question: My friends are on a trip to the world. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_3](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'To' का प्रयोग किसी fixed location के लिए होता है, जबकि 'around' का प्रयोग 'world' के साथ पूरी दुनिया की यात्रा के लिए किया जाता है.[span_3](end_span)

questions.question: The Government must strive to provide a/an fair and square deal to the citizen of its country. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_4](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Fair and square" idiom का अर्थ है ईमानदार और सीधा (honest and straightforward).[span_4](end_span)

questions.question: The culprit had been shot from the back by the police inspector. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_5](start_span)
questions.explanation: यहाँ 'in' का प्रयोग यह दर्शाने के लिए किया जाएगा कि गोली पीठ (back) में लगी थी.[span_5](end_span)

questions.question: Though Kalpana listened to Sheetal carefully, she knew that she should take it with a grain of salt. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_6](start_span)
options: regard it as exaggerated and not completely true
be do it meticulously as taking salt
accept it as really useful and worthy
questions.explanation: "Take it with a grain of salt" का अर्थ है इसे अतिशयोक्तिपूर्ण और पूर्णतः सत्य न मानना.[span_6](end_span)

questions.question: The author's writing style is characterised by its poetic language. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_7](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Lyrical' का अर्थ है poetic और romantic. यह poetic language के लिए सही शब्द है.[span_7](end_span)

questions.question: Read the books of APJ Abdul Kalam, who was a scholar. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_8](start_span)
questions.explanation: "A man of letters" का अर्थ है एक विद्वान (scholar) या लेखक.[span_8](end_span)

questions.question: My friend vanished when the goons came to fight with me. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_9](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Vanish' का अर्थ है अचानक और पूरी तरह से गायब हो जाना (disappeared). 'Goon' का अर्थ thug/गुंडा है.[span_9](end_span)

questions.question: If I was very rich, I would spend all my time and money for the poor. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_10](start_span)
questions.explanation: काल्पनिक (imaginary) स्थिति को व्यक्त करने के लिए 'If I were' का प्रयोग किया जाता है. Structure: If I were ... would + V1.[span_10](end_span)

questions.question: Last night, I failed to sleep because of some familiar issues that couldn't be avoided. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_11](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Inevitable' का अर्थ है एक ऐसी स्थिति जिसे टाला नहीं जा सकता (cannot be avoided).[span_11](end_span)

questions.question: No sooner had she finished her breakfast that she had received a phone call from her boss, informing her that she needed to come to work immediately. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_12](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'No sooner...than' एक fixed pair है. 2nd action (बाद वाला) Simple Past Tense (received) में होना चाहिए.[span_12](end_span)

questions.question: After he leave, we discussed his suggestion. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_13](start_span)
questions.explanation: Past में दो actions होने पर, पहला action Past Perfect (had + V3) में और दूसरा Simple Past में होता है.[span_13](end_span)

questions.question: Though very informative, Shweta's article was mercilessly rejected of the editor. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_14](start_span)
questions.explanation: Passive voice में action के doer (editor) को इंगित करने के लिए 'by' का प्रयोग किया जाता है.[span_14](end_span)

questions.question: Mathew decided to complete the marathon to prove that he is still fit as a fiddle in his eighties. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_15](start_span)
options: an owner of a fit horse
questions.explanation: "Fit as a fiddle" का अर्थ है एक स्वस्थ और ऊर्जावान व्यक्ति (a fit and energetic person).[span_15](end_span)

questions.question: My son will carry out my business in my absence. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_16](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Carry on' का अर्थ है किसी कार्य या व्यवसाय को जारी रखना (continue).[span_16](end_span)

questions.question: It is a fact that the same judgement can often be taken by more than one way. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_17](start_span)[span_18](start_span)
questions.explanation: Phrasal verb 'take in' का अर्थ है समझना (understand/grasp). यहाँ judgement को समझने/ग्रहण करने के संदर्भ में 'taken in' उपयुक्त है.[span_17](end_span)[span_18](end_span)

questions.question: The company plans to expand its business to the international market. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_19](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Expand' का अर्थ है किसी चीज़ की सीमा या दायरा बढ़ाना (to increase/grow).[span_19](end_span)

questions.question: He always used to say that he was not a beggar by choice and if someone could employ him, he would like to eat. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_20](start_span)
questions.explanation: वाक्य का अर्थ है कि वह अपनी मर्जी से भिखारी नहीं है, अगर उसे काम मिले तो वह काम करना पसंद करेगा ('love to work').[span_20](end_span)

questions.question: The manager, decided at last to bring the stenographer to book for her illegal money transactions after trying to ignore it several times. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_21](start_span)
options: bring her for a detailed investigation
make her accountable for her conduct
place her in a safe supportive position
questions.explanation: 'Bring someone to book' एक idiom है जिसका अर्थ है किसी को उसके किए की सज़ा देना या जवाबदेह बनाना.[span_21](end_span)

questions.question: In yesterday's fire accident, her feets are badly. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_22](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Yesterday' past tense को दर्शाता है. 'Feet' (plural of foot) के साथ plural verb 'were' आएगा.[span_22](end_span)

questions.question: The Centre of Excellence for Data Analytics (CEDA) provides quality data analytic services to various government departments on all levels as well as to public sector units at the Centre and in states. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_23](start_span)
options: various government departments at all levels
various government departments from all levels
various government departments in all levels
various government departments through all levels
questions.explanation: किसी चीज़ की position, rank या level को इंगित करने के लिए 'at' का प्रयोग किया जाता है.[span_23](end_span)

questions.question: You have tears, prepare to shed them now. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_24](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'If' का प्रयोग उस स्थिति (condition) को बताने के लिए किया जाता है जिसके तहत कुछ होता है (यदि आँसू हैं, तो बहाओ).[span_24](end_span)

questions.question: The minister promised to provide free laptops to the public if his (party came in power). (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_25](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'To come into power' का अर्थ है सरकार बनाना, इसलिए 'party forms the government' सही विकल्प है.[span_25](end_span)

questions.question: This is the group of leaders in whom the ruling government has placed its trust. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_26](start_span)
questions.explanation: वाक्य grammatically सही है. Preposition 'in' के बाद objective case 'whom' सही है.[span_26](end_span)

questions.question: During the preparation for competitive exams, Meena avoided going to parties. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_27](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Steer clear of' का अर्थ है जानबूझकर किसी चीज़ से बचना (avoided).[span_27](end_span)

questions.question: The woman to who I sold my house was a criminal. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_28](start_span)
questions.explanation: Preposition 'to' के बाद objective case pronoun 'whom' का प्रयोग होना चाहिए.[span_28](end_span)

questions.question: A sharp fall in the price of jute have led the poor jute farmers to the brink of starvation. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_29](start_span)
options: have lead the poor jute farmers
has led the poor jute farmers
questions.explanation: Subject 'A sharp fall' singular है, इसलिए singular verb 'has' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_29](end_span)

questions.question: We should not underestimate the signification of female education. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_30](start_span)
questions.explanation: यहाँ noun 'significance' (महत्व) का प्रयोग सही है, 'signification' (अर्थ) का नहीं.[span_30](end_span)

questions.question: Half of the property given to his sons by the businessman last year. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_31](start_span)
options: Half of the property has been given
Half of the property was given
Half of the property is given
questions.explanation: 'Last year' के कारण Past Tense का प्रयोग होगा. Passive voice में 'was given' सही है.[span_31](end_span)

questions.question: Even after becoming bankrupt, Charlie is able to maintain an outward show. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_32](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Keep up appearance' का अर्थ है बाहरी दिखावा बनाए रखना (maintain an outward show).[span_32](end_span)

questions.question: Amit is also a chip off the old block like his brother, Tandon. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_33](start_span)
options: resembling his parents in character and appearance
talking to others tough like a stone
getting ready for the future endeavours
questions.explanation: "A chip off the old block" का अर्थ है चरित्र और रूप में अपने माता-पिता जैसा होना.[span_33](end_span)

questions.question: Reena decided not to go to work today because she was feeling sick. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_34](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Under the weather" का अर्थ है बीमार महसूस करना (feeling sick).[span_34](end_span)

questions.question: He wanted to visiting the Golden Temple in Amritsar. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_35](start_span)
questions.explanation: To + V1 (infinitive) सही structure है. 'Wanted to visit' सही है.[span_35](end_span)

questions.question: His interpretation of the facts was impressive. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_36](start_span)
questions.explanation: Subject के रूप में 'understanding' (gerund/noun) का प्रयोग सही है.[span_36](end_span)

questions.question: [span_37](start_span)A piece of biscuit (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift)[span_37](end_span)
options: [span_38](start_span)Ex: Idiom "A piece of cake" का अर्थ है 'कुछ बहुत आसान कार्य'.[span_38](end_span)
questions.explanation: Explanation not available.

questions.question: Had I known that you were planning to visit me, I should have done all the necessary arrangements. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_39](start_span)
questions.explanation: Third conditional sentence में 'would have + V3' का प्रयोग होता है. 'Make arrangements' सही collocation है.[span_39](end_span)

questions.question: What exactly have the teachers being doing wrong? (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_40](start_span)
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous Tense का structure 'have been doing' है. Question में 'have' subject से पहले आता है.[span_40](end_span)

questions.question: If his father will give money, he will buy a sports bike. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 1st Shift) [span_41](start_span)
options: If his father will give money
questions.explanation: First conditional sentence में 'If' clause में Simple Present Tense का प्रयोग होता है.[span_41](end_span)

questions.question: I have been living without a lot of money since I lost my job. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_42](start_span)
options: as genuine as a three-dollar bill
questions.explanation: "Living hand to mouth" का अर्थ है बहुत कम पैसे में जीवन यापन करना.[span_42](end_span)

questions.question: The road is too busy for elderly people that they cannot cross safely. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_43](start_span)
options: that it is impossible for them to cross
that it cannot be crossed properly.
that it is difficult to cross.
questions.explanation: 'Too...to' structure का प्रयोग होगा: 'too busy... to cross safely'.[span_43](end_span)

questions.question: The core part in Artificial Intelligence (AI) is knowledge engineering, machine learning, machine perception, and robotics. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_44](start_span)
options: The core part from Artificial = Intelligence
The core part with Artificial = Intelligence
The core part of Artificial Intelligence
The core part on Artificial Intelligence
questions.explanation: किसी चीज़ के भाग या घटक को इंगित करने के लिए 'of' का प्रयोग होता है (Part of AI).[span_44](end_span)

questions.question: The veteran footballer was expected for reach here by 10 o'clock, the notice said. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_45](start_span)
questions.explanation: Verb 'expect' के बाद infinitive (to + V1) 'to reach' का प्रयोग होता है.[span_45](end_span)

questions.question: Mr. Patel is likely to win the elections in the sweeping majority. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_46](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'By' का प्रयोग मात्रा या सीमा (by a majority) को इंगित करने के लिए किया जाता है.[span_46](end_span)

questions.question: Not a word didn't they speak to the others about the sad turn of events. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_47](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Not a word' से वाक्य शुरू होने पर inversion का प्रयोग होता है और double negative (didn't) हटेगा. 'Did they speak' सही है.[span_47](end_span)

questions.question: Before she began, she asked the teacher whether she write with a pen or a pencil. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_48](start_span)
questions.explanation: सलाह या औचित्य पूछने के लिए 'should' का प्रयोग होता है (whether she should write).[span_48](end_span)

questions.question: The Sumo wrestler seemed to be incapable in being tired. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 2nd Shift) [span_49](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Incapable' के बाद fixed preposition 'of' का प्रयोग होता है.[span_49](end_span)

questions.question: My grandmother helps us in all the problems. She has a remedy for all the diseases. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_50](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Panacea' (रामबाण) का अर्थ है सभी रोगों का इलाज (remedy for all diseases).[span_50](end_span)

questions.question: [span_51](start_span)He is feeding a male dog and female dog (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)[span_51](end_span)
options: a male dog and lady dog
[span_52](start_span)Ex: मादा कुत्ते (female dog) को 'bitch' कहा जाता है.[span_52](end_span)
questions.explanation: Explanation not available.

questions.question: What flavour ice cream do you want? (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_53](start_span)
questions.explanation: संबंध दिखाने के लिए 'of' का प्रयोग होगा: 'flavour of ice cream'.[span_53](end_span)

questions.question: [span_54](start_span)The quality of students of an educational institute is of great importance and a crucial starting point (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift)[span_54](end_span)
options: The quality of students in an educational institute is in great importance and a crucial starting point.
The quality of students in an educational institute is of great importance and is a crucial start point
The quality of students in an educational institute is of great importance and a crucial starting point.
[span_55](start_span)Ex: संस्थान में उपस्थिति दर्शाने के लिए 'students in an educational institute' का प्रयोग बेहतर है.[span_55](end_span)
questions.explanation: Explanation not available.

questions.question: The serenity of the river was a sight to behold. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_56](start_span)
questions.explanation: "A sight to behold" का अर्थ है देखने में अत्यंत सुखद (pleasant to see).[span_56](end_span)

questions.question: Inspite mother's milk is vital to a child's health, a number of FMCG companies wrongly advertise artificially prepared infant formulas as being the best for the child. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_57](start_span)
questions.explanation: दो विचारों के बीच अंतर (contrast) व्यक्त करने के लिए 'Though' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_57](end_span)

questions.question: She asked me where my hometown is and where I worked. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_58](start_span)
questions.explanation: Reporting verb past में है, इसलिए reported speech में 'is' बदलकर 'was' हो जाएगा.[span_58](end_span)

questions.question: Ice melts fastly in the sun. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_59](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Fastly' कोई शब्द नहीं है. Adverb के रूप में भी 'fast' का ही प्रयोग होता है.[span_59](end_span)

questions.question: All the kith and kin of my deceased landlady were present to attend her funeral. (SSC CPO 29/06/2024 3rd Shift) [span_60](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Kith and kin" का अर्थ है सगे-संबंधी या रक्त संबंधी (blood relatives).[span_60](end_span)

questions.question: You have hurt so many people. Now, it is time to get a taste of your own medicine. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Matriculation Level 21/06/2024 Shift-4) [span_61](start_span)
options: to be treated the way you have treated others
to be in a risky situation
to lose control in a situation
to benefit from two different opportunities
questions.explanation: "Get a taste of your own medicine" का अर्थ है वैसा ही व्यवहार सहना जैसा आपने दूसरों के साथ किया है.[span_61](end_span)

questions.question: Stop beating around the bush and tell me what is expected out of me. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Matriculation Level 24/06/2024 Shift-4) [span_62](start_span)
options: avoiding to talk about the issue
questions.explanation: "Beating around the bush" का अर्थ है मुख्य मुद्दे पर बात करने से बचना.[span_62](end_span)

questions.question: I have been yet to go to the flower exhibition at Delhi University. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 20/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_63](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Have yet to go' (अभी जाना बाकी है) सही phrase है. Active voice में 'been' की आवश्यकता नहीं है.[span_63](end_span)

questions.question: You all need to (get into) the books prescribed in your syllabus. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 21/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_64](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Go through" का अर्थ है विस्तार से अध्ययन करना.[span_64](end_span)

questions.question: She faced a session of abuse after insisting that she was too beautiful to be liked. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 21/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_65](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Tirade of abuse" का अर्थ है लंबा और क्रोधपूर्ण भाषण/गाली-गलौज.[span_65](end_span)

questions.question: [span_66](start_span)This secret will remain between you and I. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 24/06/2024 Shift-3)[span_66](end_span)
options: [span_67](start_span)Ex: Preposition 'between' के बाद pronoun का objective case ('me') आता है.[span_67](end_span)
questions.explanation: Explanation not available.

questions.question: The plot of the story effects the character and their growth. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 25/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_68](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Effects' (noun) के स्थान पर verb 'affects' (प्रभावित करना) का प्रयोग होगा. Singular subject के लिए 'affects'.[span_68](end_span)

questions.question: The enigma of quantum mechanics remains inscrutably elusive despite of decades of intensive research by the world's leading physicists. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 25/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_69](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Despite' के साथ 'of' का प्रयोग नहीं होता है.[span_69](end_span)

questions.question: The train left before I reached the station. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 26/06/2024 Shift-3) [span_70](start_span)
questions.explanation: Past में दो कार्यों में से जो पहले हुआ (train left), उसे Past Perfect (had left) में लिखा जाता है.[span_70](end_span)

questions.question: She met my cousin, whose she later married. (SSC Selection Post Phase-XII Graduate Level 26/06/2024 Shift-4) [span_71](start_span)
questions.explanation: Object के रूप में relative pronoun 'whom' का प्रयोग होगा (जिससे शादी की).[span_71](end_span)

questions.question: I decided to call out to various bookstores in the area to see if any of them had the book I needed. (SSC CHSL Tier II 02/11/2023) [span_72](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Call around" का अर्थ है अलग-अलग जगहों पर फोन करना (जानकारी के लिए).[span_72](end_span)

questions.question: This lesser known heritage building is so beautiful as the Red Fort. (SSC CHSL Tier II 02/11/2023) [span_73](start_span)
options: This less known heritage building is much beautiful than the Red Fort.
This heritage building is as beautiful as the Red Fort.
This lesser known heritage building is very much beautiful as the Red Fort.
This lesser known heritage building is as much beautiful as the Red Fort.
questions.explanation: समानता (similarity) दर्शाने के लिए 'as...as' का प्रयोग होता है. 'So...as' का प्रयोग negative में होता है.[span_73](end_span)

questions.question: It was the home minister of the country who took the decision to change a laws pertaining to migration of people from one state to another. (SSC CHSL Tier II 02/11/2023) [span_74](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Laws' specific हैं, इसलिए article 'a' के स्थान पर 'the' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_74](end_span)

questions.question: The film received critical acclaim for being a more innovative movie of the year. (SSC CHSL Tier II 02/11/2023) [span_75](start_span)
questions.explanation: यहाँ तुलना नहीं हो रही है, इसलिए 'more' हटेगा. Vowel sound के कारण 'an' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_75](end_span)

questions.question: I will definitely return your notes at Saturday evening. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_76](start_span)
questions.explanation: समय सीमा (deadline) दर्शाने के लिए 'by' Saturday evening का प्रयोग होगा.[span_76](end_span)

questions.question: My sister resembles to my mother a lot in looks and in temperament. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_77](start_span)
questions.explanation: Verb 'resemble' के बाद preposition 'to' का प्रयोग नहीं होता.[span_77](end_span)

questions.question: Effective communication is a skill that can significant enhance your personal and professional life. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_78](start_span)
questions.explanation: Verb 'enhance' को modify करने के लिए adverb 'significantly' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_78](end_span)

questions.question: We have received no information so far to the main island. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_79](start_span)
questions.explanation: स्रोत (source) बताने के लिए 'from' का प्रयोग होगा (information from the main island).[span_79](end_span)

questions.question: When he was falsely accused of embezzlement, he was beside himself in anger. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_80](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Beside himself" (बेकाबू/भावुक होना) सही idiom है.[span_80](end_span)

questions.question: She is married with a rich businessman and has enough money to splurge on luxuries. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_81](start_span)
questions.explanation: Passive sense में 'married to' का प्रयोग होता है, 'with' का नहीं.[span_81](end_span)

questions.question: Sherpas have prospered and come along the way from being just porters to becoming mountaineers. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_82](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Come a long way" (बहुत प्रगति करना) सही idiom है.[span_82](end_span)

questions.question: You have a lot of coconut trees in your village, do you? (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_83](start_span)
questions.explanation: Positive sentence के लिए negative question tag 'don't you?' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_83](end_span)

questions.question: By next summer, I will have completed my internship and will have returned to school. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_84](start_span)
questions.explanation: Parallelism के लिए 'and returned' (will have common है) सही structure है.[span_84](end_span)

questions.question: Tomorrow, they will be take a flight to their dream vacation destination. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_85](start_span)
questions.explanation: Future Continuous Tense के लिए 'will be taking' सही है.[span_85](end_span)

questions.question: As bombs keep falling on Gaza, hundreds of thousands of children have been order to flee their homes. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_86](start_span)
questions.explanation: Passive voice (Present Perfect) में 'have been ordered' (V3) का प्रयोग होगा.[span_86](end_span)

questions.question: The pollution level ought to keep under control. (SSC CPO Tier II 08/01/2024) [span_87](start_span)
questions.explanation: Passive meaning के लिए 'ought to be kept' (रखा जाना चाहिए) सही है.[span_87](end_span)

questions.question: This is the challenge task I have ever encountered. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023) [span_88](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'The' और 'ever' के साथ Superlative degree 'most challenging' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_88](end_span)

questions.question: Ashoka was not only a great warrior but also a very wiser ruler. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023) [span_89](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Very' के बाद positive degree adjective 'wise' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_89](end_span)

questions.question: Cinema provides the most universal entertainment. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023) [span_90](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Universal' non-gradable है, इसलिए 'most' नहीं लगेगा. 'A universal' सही है.[span_90](end_span)

questions.question: He is taller and most handsome than his friend. (SSC CGL Tier II 26/10/2023) [span_91](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Taller' (comparative) के साथ parallel structure के लिए 'more handsome' (comparative) का प्रयोग होगा.[span_91](end_span)

questions.question: Lots of kids (was visualised) crossing the road when the bus arrived. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift) [span_92](start_span)
questions.explanation: Plural subject 'Lots of kids' के साथ plural verb 'were' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_92](end_span)

questions.question: The use of chemicals, insecticides and pesticides began after the Green Revolution. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 1st Shift) [span_93](start_span)
options: A practice of chemicals, insecticides and pesticides
The custom of chemicals, insecticides and pesticides
Consumption of chemicals, insecticides and pesticides
The usage of chemicals, insecticides and pesticides
questions.explanation: 'Usage' (प्रथा/तरीका) शब्द 'use' से अधिक उपयुक्त है.[span_93](end_span)

questions.question: Identify the sentence that correctly uses the indefinite article. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_94](start_span)[span_95](start_span)
options: There are three cars parked outside: a Mercedes, an Jaguar and an Fiat.
There are three cars parked outside: an Mercedes, a Jaguar and a Fiat.
There are three cars parked outside: a Mercedes, a Jaguar and a Fiat.
There are three cars parked outside: a Mercedes, an Jaguar and a Fiat.
questions.explanation: Mercedes, Jaguar, Fiat सभी consonant sound से शुरू होते हैं, इसलिए 'a' लगेगा.[span_94](end_span)[span_95](end_span)

questions.question: He is faster than smart. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift)
options: [span_96](start_span)Ex: एक ही व्यक्ति के दो गुणों की तुलना के लिए 'more + positive degree' (more fast) का प्रयोग होता है.[span_96](end_span)
questions.explanation: Explanation not available.

questions.question: The Taj Mahal is one of the much popular seven wonders of the world. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_97](start_span)
questions.explanation: "One of the" के बाद Superlative degree 'most popular' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_97](end_span)

questions.question: She trusted her husband but he stabbed her in the neck when he usurped her inheritance. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_98](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Stabbed her in the back" (पीठ में छुरा घोंपना/धोखा देना) सही idiom है.[span_98](end_span)

questions.question: I like to read books, but my brother prefers to watching movies. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 3rd Shift) [span_99](start_span)
questions.explanation: Prefer के बाद infinitive 'to watch' का प्रयोग किया जा सकता है (या prefer watching to reading). यहाँ 'to watch' सही है.[span_99](end_span)

questions.question: This case is serious. You need to look into this matter; otherwise, the situation will get out of control soon. (SSC CPO 03/10/2023 3rd Shift) [span_100](start_span)
questions.explanation: "Look into" (जांच करना) सही phrasal verb है.[span_100](end_span)

questions.question: The village Seoni is located 113 km away from the capital city of MP, Bhopal. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 1st Shift) [span_101](start_span)
options: adjacent from city capital of MP, Bhopal
proximate from capital of MP, Bhopal
near from the city capital of MP, Bhopal
far from the capital city of MP, Bhopal
questions.explanation: 113 km दूर होने के लिए 'far from' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_101](end_span)

questions.question: Kiran's teacher was doubtful on her success. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_102](start_span)
questions.explanation: 'Doubtful' के साथ fixed preposition 'of' का प्रयोग होता है.[span_102](end_span)

questions.question: Harry is the one sitting on the corner. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_103](start_span)
questions.explanation: कोने में बैठने के लिए 'in the corner' (या at the corner) का प्रयोग होता है.[span_103](end_span)

questions.question: The Board of Film Analysts vituperated the novice Indonesian film-maker and cancelled its nomination for the 'Golden Globe Award'. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 2nd Shift) [span_104](start_span)
options: dealt in a delicate and polite manner
recognised and praised the talent of
censured with harsh and abusive language
questions.explanation: 'Vituperated' का अर्थ है कठोर और अपमानजनक भाषा में निंदा करना.[span_104](end_span)

questions.question: Naina is leaving and I am think to apply for her job. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift) [span_105](start_span)
questions.explanation: Continuous tense 'am thinking' और 'about applying' (के बारे में सोचना) सही structure है.[span_105](end_span)

questions.question: Malati has a difficult job, but she does it good. (SSC CPO 04/10/2023 3rd Shift) [span_106](start_span)
questions.explanation: Verb 'does' को modify करने के लिए adverb 'well' का प्रयोग होगा.[span_106](end_span)
